jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Cuemath
jsonLd.description:
Cuemath, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cuemath:
Cuemath is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cuemath!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
